channel.title: Acromegaly Update
channel.description: Weekly digest of new research on acromegaly — trials, therapies, and clinical updates.
channel.itunes:author: Marea Therapeutics
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly digest of new research on acromegaly — trials, therapies, and clinical updates.

item.title: Acromegaly Update — Tuesday April 28, 2026
item.description: This week's acromegaly literature is headlined by a landmark cardiovascular disease review in *Endocrine Reviews* and a cluster of high-yield JCEM papers covering biomarker-guided therapy, standardized pituitary imaging, patient-reported quality of life, and histological predictors of surgical remission.
item.itunes:title: Acromegaly Update — Tuesday April 28, 2026
